$comment: Deny-by-default dependency-license allowlist (design lock L-57 / O-7). 'allowed_licenses' are SPDX identifiers acceptable for code linked into shipped engine cores. 'dependency_licenses' maps each declared dependency name to its verified SPDX license; a dependency missing from this map counts as UNKNOWN and fails CI. 'v8' is the js-engine M0 spike's prebuilt NuGet monolith (v8-v143-x64 13.0.245.25) — spike-only, never shipped, acquired outside vcpkg (recorded here so its license clearance is on the books; the recorded L-42 deviation lives in spikes/js-engine/FINDINGS.md). 'wasmtime' (prebuilt C API 46.0.1) and 'wasm-micro-runtime' (WAMR 2.4.5, built from a pinned source tarball; its 'wamrc' AOT compiler prebuilt is the same project/license) are the wasm M0 spike's runtimes — likewise spike-only, acquired outside vcpkg, recorded for clearance; deviations in spikes/wasm/FINDINGS.md. Notes: blake3 is dual-licensed 'CC0-1.0 OR Apache-2.0' — we elect Apache-2.0; 'Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception' is a valid SPDX expression whose exception only ADDS permissions relative to plain Apache-2.0 (waives Section-4 notice duties for compiled-binary redistribution), so allowlisting it is strictly no-riskier than Apache-2.0 itself.
